name: PAX FLOW Raised Mouthpieces
summary: Enhance your product offering with the PAX Flow Raised Mouthpiece – a genuine PAX Labs accessory engineered for comfort, style, and performance.
description: Enhance your product offering with the PAX Flow Raised Mouthpiece – a genuine PAX Labs accessory engineered for comfort, style, and performance. Designed exclusively for the PAX Flow Vaporiser, this elevated mouthpiece provides a longer draw path for cooler vapour and smoother airflow. Its ergonomic tubular shape ensures a comfortable fit for every session, making it a popular accessory for both new and returning customers. Authentic PAX Labs replacement accessory – direct from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
